# IR Program
# Generated by compiler-project

function main: bool ()
  entry:
      a_1 = true
      b_1 = false
      JUMP_IF a_1, L4
      JUMP L2
  L4:
      JUMP_IF b_1, L1
      JUMP L2
  L1:
      t1 = true
      JUMP L3
  L2:
      t2 = false
  L3:
      t3 = PHI (t1, L1), (t2, L2)
      c_1 = t3
      JUMP_IF a_1, L5
      JUMP L8
  L8:
      JUMP_IF b_1, L5
      JUMP L6
  L5:
      t4 = true
      JUMP L7
  L6:
      t5 = false
  L7:
      t6 = PHI (t4, L5), (t5, L6)
      d_1 = t6
      t7 = NOT a_1
      e_1 = t7
      RETURN d_1
